Title: User Registration - Personal Account
Preconditions: Browser open, QA environment: https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com, cleared cache/cookies
Steps:
1. Navigate to storefront homepage
2. Click 'Sign Up' in header
3. Select 'Personal' account type
4. Fill required fields:
   - First Name: Test
   - Last Name: User
   - Email: testuser-{timestamp}@example.com
   - Password: TestP@ss123!
   - Confirm Password: TestP@ss123!
5. Accept terms and conditions
6. Click 'Create Account' button
7. Verify confirmation page displays
8. Check email for confirmation
9. Log in with new credentials
Expected Result:
- Registration form submits successfully
- Confirmation page displays 'Registration successful' message
- Confirmation email received within 2 minutes
- User can sign in with new credentials
- Account visible in Admin panel under Customers
- Profile displays correct personal information

Title: User Registration - Organization Account
Steps:
1. Navigate to registration page
2. Select 'Organization' account type
3. Fill required fields:
   - Company Name: Test Organization {timestamp}
   - First Name: Admin
   - Last Name: User
   - Email: orgadmin-{timestamp}@example.com
   - Password: OrgP@ss123!
   - Confirm Password: OrgP@ss123!
4. Accept terms and conditions
5. Click 'Create Account' button
6. Verify organization creation
7. Log in with new credentials
8. Verify organization context
Expected Result:
- Organization account created successfully
- Company appears in Organizations list in Admin
- User assigned as organization administrator
- Organization name visible in storefront header
- B2B features accessible (Company Members, Quick Order)
- User can switch between organizations if multiple exist

Title: Sign In - Personal User
Preconditions: Valid personal user account exists: USER_EMAIL from .env
Steps:
1. Navigate to https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com
2. Click 'Sign In' in header
3. Enter email: USER_EMAIL
4. Enter password: USER_PASSWORD
5. Click 'Sign In' button
6. Verify successful authentication
Expected Result:
- User authenticated successfully
- Redirected to homepage or dashboard
- User name displayed in header
- Cart icon accessible
- Wishlist accessible
- Account menu shows Logout option
- No error messages displayed

Title: Sign In - Organization User
Steps:
1. Navigate to sign-in page
2. Enter organization user email
3. Enter password
4. Click 'Sign In' button
5. Verify organization context active
6. Check B2B features available
Expected Result:
- User logged in with organization context
- Organization name visible in header
- Organization selector displays (if multiple orgs)
- B2B features accessible: Quick Order, Company Members, Quotes
- Cart specific to organization
- Pricing reflects organization contracts (if configured)

Title: Forgot Password Flow
Steps:
1. Navigate to sign-in page
2. Click 'Forgot Password?' link
3. Enter registered email address
4. Click 'Send Reset Link' button
5. Check email for password reset link
6. Click reset link (opens in new tab)
7. Enter new password twice
8. Click 'Reset Password' button
9. Verify reset successful
10. Log in with new password
Expected Result:
- Reset link email received within 2 minutes
- Reset link opens password reset form
- Password accepts strong passwords (8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special)
- Password reset completes successfully
- Confirmation message: 'Password reset successful'
- Can sign in with new password
- Old password no longer works
- Reset link expires after use (cannot reuse)

Title: Sign Out
Steps:
1. Click on user name/account menu in header
2. Click 'Sign Out' or 'Log Out'
3. Verify sign-out completed
4. Attempt to access protected pages
Expected Result:
- User signed out successfully
- Redirected to homepage or sign-in page
- Account menu no longer shows user name
- Cart cleared (or saved for next login)
- Attempting to access account pages redirects to sign-in
- Session token revoked

Title: Catalog Browsing - Category Navigation
Steps:
1. Navigate to main catalog from header menu
2. Hover over main category (e.g., 'Snacks')
3. Verify subcategories display
4. Click on subcategory (e.g., 'Chips & Pretzels')
5. Verify category page loads
6. Check breadcrumbs
7. Verify product listing displays
Expected Result:
- Main categories load in header/menu
- Subcategories display on hover/click
- Category page loads with correct products
- Breadcrumbs show: Home > Snacks > Chips & Pretzels
- Product count displayed (e.g., '24 products')
- Facets/filters display on left sidebar
- Products show image, name, price, Add to Cart button

Title: Product Faceted Filters - Apply Multiple Filters
Preconditions: User on category page with filterable products
Steps:
1. Navigate to category with filters (e.g., 'Electronics')
2. Verify facets display (Brand, Price, Size, Color)
3. Select filter: Brand = 'Sony'
4. Verify results filter
5. Add filter: Price range $100-$500
6. Verify results further refined
7. Add filter: Size = 'Medium'
8. Verify chip badges display for active filters
9. Click X on one chip to remove filter
10. Verify results update
Expected Result:
- Facets display with available filter values
- Applying filter updates product listing immediately
- Product count updates after each filter
- Multiple filters work together (AND logic)
- Chip badges display for active filters
- Removing filter chip updates results
- Filter state persists on page refresh
- No products case shows 'No products match your filters' message

Title: Product Faceted Filters - Reset Filters
Preconditions: Multiple filters applied to product listing
Steps:
1. Apply 3+ filters to category page
2. Verify filtered results display
3. Click 'Reset Filters' or 'Clear All' button
4. Verify all filters cleared
Expected Result:
- 'Reset Filters' button is visible when filters active
- Clicking reset removes all filters
- Product listing returns to full unfiltered state
- Chip badges disappear
- Product count returns to total
- Facet selections cleared

Title: Product Sorting
Preconditions: User on category page with multiple products
Steps:
1. Navigate to category page
2. Locate sort dropdown (usually top-right)
3. Select 'Price: Low to High'
4. Verify products sorted by price ascending
5. Select 'Price: High to Low'
6. Verify products sorted descending
7. Select 'Name: A-Z'
8. Verify alphabetical sort
Expected Result:
- Sort options available: Price (Low-High, High-Low), Name (A-Z, Z-A), Newest, Most Popular
- Sorting applies immediately without page reload
- Product order updates correctly
- Pagination resets to page 1 on sort change
- Sort selection persists on pagination

Title: Product Pagination
Steps:
1. Navigate to category with many products
2. Verify pagination controls display at bottom
3. Note products on page 1
4. Click 'Next' or page '2'
5. Verify new products load
6. Verify page indicator updates
7. Click 'Previous' to return to page 1
8. Verify original products display
Expected Result:
- Pagination displays when products exceed page size (typically 20)
- Page numbers visible (1, 2, 3... or dropdown)
- 'Next' and 'Previous' buttons functional
- Current page highlighted
- URL updates with page parameter (e.g., ?page=2)
- Products do not duplicate across pages
- Scroll to top on page change

Title: Product Search - Basic Query
Preconditions: User logged in, products exist in catalog
Steps:
1. Click on search bar in header
2. Enter search term 'laptop'
3. Press Enter or click search icon
4. Verify search results page loads
5. Verify results match search term
6. Verify result count displayed
Expected Result:
- Search results page displays
- Results contain products matching 'laptop' in name or description
- Result count shows (e.g., '12 results for laptop')
- Products display same as category page (image, name, price, Add to Cart)
- Filters available to refine search
- Breadcrumbs show: Home > Search Results
- Search term visible in search bar

Title: Product Search - Search Suggestions
Preconditions: User on homepage with search bar focused
Steps:
1. Click on search bar (do not type yet)
2. Verify dropdown appears (search history or suggestions)
3. Start typing 'lapt'
4. Verify autocomplete suggestions appear
5. Click on suggested product or term
6. Verify navigation to product/results
Expected Result:
- Dropdown appears on search bar focus
- Suggestions update as user types (after 2-3 characters)
- Suggestions include: Products, Categories, Recent Searches
- Clicking suggestion navigates to product detail or search results
- ESC key closes suggestion dropdown
- Clicking outside closes dropdown

Title: Product Search - No Results
Steps:
1. Enter nonsense search term: 'xyzabc123notfound'
2. Press Enter
3. Verify no results handling
Expected Result:
- Search executes without error
- Message displays: 'No results found for xyzabc123notfound'
- Suggestions shown: 'Try different keywords' or 'Browse categories'
- Search bar remains filled with term
- Option to clear search and browse catalog

Title: Product Search - Special Characters
Steps:
1. Enter search with special characters: 'laptop & monitor'
2. Press Enter
3. Verify search handles special chars
4. Try search: '<script>alert()</script>'
5. Verify XSS protection
Expected Result:
- Special characters in normal queries handled gracefully
- Results return products matching terms (ignoring special chars like &)
- XSS attempts sanitized (no script execution)
- No server errors
- Search query escaped in URL

Title: Add to Cart - From Product Page
Steps:
1. Navigate to product detail page (e.g., 'Wireless Headphones')
2. Verify product details load (name, image, price, description)
3. Verify quantity selector (default: 1)
4. Verify 'Add to Cart' button visible and enabled
5. Click 'Add to Cart' button
6. Verify success notification
7. Verify cart icon updates
Expected Result:
- Product detail page loads fully
- 'Add to Cart' button enabled (if in stock)
- Clicking button adds product to cart
- Success notification: 'Wireless Headphones added to cart'
- Cart icon count increments by 1
- Mini-cart preview displays (optional, may slide in)
- Product visible in cart

Title: Add to Cart - Product Variations
Steps:
1. Navigate to product with variations (e.g., T-Shirt with Size and Color)
2. Verify variation selectors display
3. Select Size: Medium
4. Select Color: Blue
5. Verify price updates (if variant pricing exists)
6. Click 'Add to Cart'
7. View cart
8. Verify correct variant added
Expected Result:
- Variation selectors (dropdown or swatches) display
- Selecting variation updates selection state
- Price updates if variant has different price
- Stock status updates per variant
- 'Add to Cart' disabled until all required variations selected
- Cart displays: 'T-Shirt - Medium, Blue'
- Correct SKU and variant in cart

Title: View Cart - Display Items
Steps:
1. Add 2-3 different products to cart
2. Click cart icon in header
3. Verify mini-cart displays
4. Click 'View Cart' button
5. Verify full cart page loads
Expected Result:
- Mini-cart dropdown displays items (up to 3-5)
- Mini-cart shows: Product name, image, quantity, line price
- Mini-cart shows subtotal
- 'View Cart' button present
- Full cart page displays all items
- Full cart shows: Product image, name, SKU, quantity selector, line total, remove button
- Subtotal, tax, shipping placeholder, grand total displayed

Title: Update Cart Quantity - Increase
Steps:
1. Navigate to full cart page
2. Locate product quantity selector
3. Click '+' button or enter higher number (e.g., 5)
4. Verify quantity updates
5. Verify line total recalculates
6. Verify cart totals update
Expected Result:
- Quantity selector allows increase (+ button or direct input)
- Quantity updates immediately or on blur
- Line total = Unit Price x Quantity
- Subtotal updates
- Cart grand total updates
- Stock validation (cannot exceed available stock)
- Error message if quantity exceeds stock: 'Only X available'

Title: Update Cart Quantity - Decrease
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart page
2. Find product with quantity >= 2
3. Click '-' button
4. Verify quantity decreases by 1
5. Verify totals update
6. Decrease to quantity 1
7. Verify cannot decrease below 1 (or removes item)
Expected Result:
- Quantity decreases by 1 each click
- Line total and cart totals update
- Cannot decrease below 1 (button disabled or grayed)
- Alternative: Decreasing to 0 removes item (depends on implementation)
- Totals recalculate correctly

Title: Remove Item from Cart
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart page
2. Locate remove/delete icon or button (usually X or trash icon)
3. Click remove on one item
4. Verify confirmation (optional) or immediate removal
5. Verify item removed from cart
6. Verify totals update
Expected Result:
- Remove button/icon visible for each item
- Clicking remove deletes item immediately or after confirmation
- Item disappears from cart
- Cart totals recalculate
- If cart becomes empty: 'Your cart is empty' message displays
- Option to continue shopping

Title: Cart - Save for Later
Section: Full Regression > Cart > Save for Later
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart page
2. Locate 'Save for Later' link/button on cart item
3. Click 'Save for Later'
4. Verify item moves to 'Saved for Later' section below cart
5. Verify cart totals update (item removed from active cart)
6. Click 'Move to Cart' on saved item
7. Verify item returns to active cart
Expected Result:
- 'Save for Later' option available for each cart item
- Clicking moves item to separate 'Saved for Later' section
- Item removed from active cart (totals update)
- 'Saved for Later' section displays below cart with saved items
- 'Move to Cart' button available on saved items
- Saved items persist across sessions

Title: Cart - Promo Code Application
Steps:
1. Add products to cart
2. Navigate to cart page
3. Locate promo/coupon code field
4. Enter valid code: SAVE10
5. Click 'Apply' button
6. Verify discount applied
7. Verify cart total reduced
Expected Result:
- Promo code input field visible
- Entering code and clicking Apply processes code
- Valid code applies discount
- Discount line appears: 'Promo Code (SAVE10): -$10.00'
- Grand total reduced by discount amount
- Success message: 'Promo code applied successfully'
- Code displayed in cart (with option to remove)
- Can only apply one code at a time (or multiple, depending on rules)

Title: Cart - Invalid Promo Code
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart page
2. Enter invalid promo code: INVALID123
3. Click 'Apply'
4. Verify error handling
Expected Result:
- Error message displays: 'Invalid promo code' or 'Code not found'
- No discount applied
- Cart totals unchanged
- Promo field remains visible to try again

Title: Checkout - Standard Delivery
Preconditions: Products in cart, shipping addresses configured
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Click 'Checkout' or 'Proceed to Checkout'
3. Verify checkout page loads
4. Select 'Delivery' option (vs. Pickup)
5. Select or add shipping address
6. Select shipping method (e.g., Ground - 5-7 days)
7. Select payment method (e.g., Credit Card)
8. Review order summary
9. Click 'Place Order'
10. Verify order confirmation
Expected Result:
- Checkout page loads with progress indicator
- Delivery option selectable
- Address form displays (or address selector if saved addresses exist)
- Shipping methods display with cost and estimated delivery
- Payment methods display (Credit Card, PayPal, etc.)
- Order summary shows: Items, Subtotal, Shipping, Tax, Grand Total
- 'Place Order' button enabled
- Order processes successfully
- Confirmation page displays order number
- Confirmation email sent

Title: Checkout - BOPIS Pickup Location Selection
Preconditions: Products in cart, pickup locations configured
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Click 'Checkout'
3. Select 'Pickup' option
4. Click 'Select pickup location'
5. Verify pickup location modal opens
6. Verify map displays with location markers
7. Verify location list displays
8. Enter search term or use current location
9. Click on location in list or marker on map
10. Verify location details display
11. Click 'Select' or 'Choose this location'
12. Verify modal closes
13. Verify selected location displays in checkout
14. Complete checkout
Expected Result:
- 'Pickup' option available in checkout
- Clicking 'Select pickup location' opens modal
- Modal displays map (Google Maps) with markers
- Location list displays with details: Name, Address, Phone, Hours, Availability
- Search bar available to filter locations
- 'Use my location' button for geolocation
- Clicking location highlights marker and shows info window
- 'Select' button in info window or list item
- Selected location displays in checkout: Name, Address
- No shipping cost applied
- Order confirmation shows pickup location
- Pickup instructions in confirmation email

Title: Checkout - Shipping Address - Add New
Steps:
1. Proceed to checkout
2. Select 'Delivery' option
3. Click 'Add New Address' or 'Enter Address'
4. Fill address form:
   - First Name: John
   - Last Name: Doe
   - Address Line 1: 123 Test Street
   - Address Line 2: Apt 4B
   - City: Testville
   - State: California
   - ZIP: 90210
   - Country: United States
   - Phone: +1-555-123-4567
5. Check 'Save this address' (if option exists)
6. Click 'Continue' or 'Use This Address'
7. Verify address accepted
8. Complete checkout
Expected Result:
- Address form displays with all required fields
- Form validates input (ZIP format, phone format, required fields)
- State dropdown populated based on Country selection
- 'Save this address' checkbox available
- Clicking Continue validates and accepts address
- Address displays in order summary
- If saved, address appears in account addresses
- Order confirmation shows correct shipping address

Title: Checkout - Payment - Credit Card
Preconditions: Checkout at payment step, test credit card available
Steps:
1. Proceed through checkout to payment step
2. Select 'Bank card' or 'Credit Card' payment method
3. Verify payment form loads (CyberSource, Authorize.Net, or Skyflow)
4. Enter test card details:
   - Card Number: 4622943127013705 (CyberSource) or 4111111111111111 (Test)
   - Name: John Doe
   - Expiry: 12/2029
   - CVV: 123
5. Verify billing address (same as shipping or different)
6. Click 'Place Order'
7. Verify payment processing
8. Verify order confirmation
Expected Result:
- Payment method selector displays available options
- Credit card form loads (may be iframe or direct form)
- Card number field formats input (adds spaces)
- Card brand detected (Visa, MasterCard, etc. icon appears)
- Expiry date validates format (MM/YYYY)
- CVV field masks input (3-4 digits)
- Billing address auto-filled from shipping (or option to use different)
- 'Place Order' button processes payment
- Loading indicator shows during processing
- Order confirmation displays order number
- Payment status: Authorized or Completed
- Confirmation email sent

Title: Checkout - Order Review Before Placement
Preconditions: User at final checkout step before placing order
Steps:
1. Proceed through all checkout steps
2. Arrive at final review/place order page
3. Verify order summary displays:
   - Items with images, names, quantities, prices
   - Shipping address
   - Shipping method and cost
   - Payment method (last 4 digits of card)
   - Subtotal, Shipping, Tax, Grand Total
4. Verify 'Place Order' button
5. Verify can navigate back to edit sections
Expected Result:
- Order summary displays all order details
- Items listed with thumbnails
- Shipping address correct
- Shipping method and cost shown
- Payment method shown (secure, no full card number)
- All costs itemized
- Grand total highlighted
- 'Place Order' button prominent
- 'Edit' links available to modify address, payment, etc.
- Order total matches expectations

Title: Order Confirmation Page
Steps:
1. Complete order checkout
2. Verify order confirmation page displays
3. Verify order number present
4. Verify order details match
5. Verify actions available (print, track, continue shopping)
Expected Result:
- Confirmation page displays immediately after order placement
- Success message: 'Thank you for your order!' or 'Order placed successfully'
- Order number displayed prominently: 'Order #CO-123456'
- Order details summary:
  - Items ordered
  - Shipping address
  - Shipping method
  - Payment method
  - Total amount
- Estimated delivery date shown (for delivery)
- Pickup instructions shown (for pickup orders)
- Actions available: 'Print Order', 'Track Order', 'Continue Shopping'
- Cart cleared (empty)
- Order appears in account Order History

Title: Order Confirmation Email
Steps:
1. Complete checkout and place order
2. Note order number
3. Check email inbox (email used for order)
4. Locate order confirmation email
5. Verify email content
6. Click tracking link (if applicable)
Expected Result:
- Confirmation email received within 5 minutes
- Email subject: 'Order Confirmation - #CO-123456'
- Email contains:
  - Order number
  - Order date
  - Items ordered (with images, names, quantities, prices)
  - Shipping/Pickup address
  - Shipping method
  - Total amount paid
  - Estimated delivery/pickup date
  - Tracking link (once shipped)
  - Contact information for support
- Email formatted professionally (HTML, branded)
- Tracking link functional (if order shipped)

Title: Order History - View Orders List
Preconditions: User logged in with previous orders
Steps:
1. Log in to account
2. Navigate to 'My Account' or 'Orders'
3. Click 'Order History' or 'My Orders'
4. Verify orders list displays
Expected Result:
- Order History page loads
- Orders listed in reverse chronological order (newest first)
- Each order displays: Order Number, Date, Status, Total
- Order status badge (New, Processing, Shipped, Completed)
- 'View Details' link/button for each order
- Pagination or infinite scroll if many orders
- Filter/search options available

Title: Order History - View Order Details
Steps:
1. Navigate to Order History
2. Click 'View Details' on an order
3. Verify order details page loads
Expected Result:
- Order details page displays
- Order number and date shown
- Order status badge
- Items listed with images, names, quantities, prices
- Shipping/Pickup address shown
- Shipping method and tracking number (if shipped)
- Payment method (last 4 digits)
- Order totals: Subtotal, Shipping, Tax, Total
- Actions available: 'Reorder', 'Track Shipment', 'Print Invoice', 'Request Return'

Title: Order History - Reorder
Preconditions: User logged in, completed order exists
Steps:
1. Navigate to Order History
2. Select completed order
3. Click 'Reorder All' button
4. Verify products added to cart
Expected Result:
- 'Reorder All' button available for completed orders
- Clicking button adds all items from order to cart
- Success notification: 'X items added to cart'
- Redirected to cart or mini-cart updates
- Items in cart match order (quantities correct)
- If any items out of stock or unavailable: warning message displayed

Title: Order Tracking
Steps:
1. Navigate to Order Details for shipped order
2. Verify tracking number displayed
3. Click 'Track Shipment' link
4. Verify tracking page or carrier site opens
Expected Result:
- Tracking number visible once order status is 'Shipped'
- 'Track Shipment' link or button available
- Clicking link opens carrier tracking page (UPS, FedEx, USPS, etc.)
- Tracking number auto-populated
- Alternative: In-app tracking displays shipment status

Title: Order Status Updates
Steps:
1. Place new order (status: New)
2. Wait for admin to process (status: Processing)
3. Wait for shipment (status: Shipped)
4. Verify status updates in Order History
5. Check for status notification emails
Expected Result:
- Order status badge updates in Order History
- Status progression: New → Processing → Shipped → Completed
- Status change emails sent at each stage
- Estimated delivery date updates
- Tracking number added when shipped

Title: BOPIS - Pickup Location Map Display
Preconditions: Cart has products, multiple pickup locations exist
Steps:
1. Add products to cart
2. Navigate to cart
3. Select 'Pickup' option
4. Click 'Select pickup location'
5. Verify map modal opens
6. Verify map displays correctly
7. Verify markers for all locations
8. Zoom in/out on map
9. Pan map
10. Verify map stability
Expected Result:
- Map modal opens smoothly
- Google Maps loads fully
- Markers display for all available pickup locations
- Markers clustered if many locations close together
- Map interactive (zoom with +/- buttons or scroll, pan with drag)
- Map dimensions stable (no jumping or resizing)
- Current location marker (if geolocation enabled)
- Map centered on user location or region

Title: BOPIS - Search Pickup Locations
Steps:
1. Open pickup location selector
2. Locate search bar
3. Enter city name (e.g., 'San Francisco')
4. Verify locations filter
5. Verify map updates
6. Enter ZIP code (e.g., '94102')
7. Verify further filtering
8. Clear search using X button
9. Verify all locations return
Expected Result:
- Search bar visible at top of modal
- Placeholder text: 'Search by city, ZIP, or address'
- Typing filters location list in real-time
- Map re-centers to search area
- Markers update to show filtered locations
- Search by city, ZIP, address, or location name
- Autocomplete suggestions (optional)
- Clear button (X) visible when search has text
- Clearing search returns all locations

Title: BOPIS - Filter Pickup Locations
Preconditions: Pickup location modal open with filterable locations
Steps:
1. Open pickup location selector
2. Verify filter options display
3. Apply filter: 'Open Now'
4. Verify locations filter to only open locations
5. Apply filter: 'In Stock' (product available)
6. Verify further filtering
7. Clear filters
8. Verify all locations return
Expected Result:
- Filter options display: 'Open Now', 'In Stock', 'Distance' (if geolocation)
- Filters apply to location list immediately
- Map markers update to show filtered locations
- Location count updates (e.g., 'Showing 5 of 12 locations')
- Multiple filters work together (AND logic)
- 'Clear Filters' button visible when filters active
- Clearing filters restores all locations

Title: BOPIS - Select Pickup Location
Steps:
1. Open pickup location modal
2. Click on location in list
3. Verify marker highlights on map
4. Verify info window opens on map
5. Click 'Select' in info window
6. Verify modal closes
7. Verify location selected in checkout
Expected Result:
- Clicking location in list highlights it
- Corresponding map marker changes color/icon
- Map pans to center on selected location
- Info window opens on marker showing: Location Name, Address, Phone, Hours, Availability
- 'Select' button in info window
- Clicking 'Select' closes modal
- Selected location displays in checkout/cart
- Location name and address shown
- 'Change Location' option available

Title: BOPIS - Mobile Pickup Flow
Preconditions: Mobile device (iPhone Safari or Chrome Android), cart has products
Steps:
1. Add products to cart on mobile
2. Navigate to cart
3. Select 'Pickup' option
4. Click 'Select pickup location'
5. Verify mobile modal/page opens
6. Verify map displays (possibly list-first layout)
7. Interact with map (pinch zoom, tap marker)
8. Select location
9. Verify checkout completes on mobile
Expected Result:
- Pickup option works on mobile
- Pickup location selector optimized for mobile
- Map displays (may be smaller or below list)
- Touch interactions work: pinch zoom, tap markers, swipe
- Location list scrollable
- Select button easily tappable (44x44px minimum)
- Modal close button accessible
- No horizontal scrolling required
- Form fields appropriately sized for mobile keyboards

Title: Payment - CyberSource - Valid Card
Preconditions: Checkout at payment step, CyberSource configured
Steps:
1. Proceed to payment step
2. Select 'Bank card (CyberSource)'
3. Wait for CyberSource iframe to load
4. Enter card: 4622943127013705
5. Enter name: John Smith
6. Enter expiry: 09/2029
7. Enter CVV: 838
8. Click 'Place order'
Expected Result:
- CyberSource payment form loads in iframe
- All fields accept input
- No validation errors
- Submitting attempts to authorize payment
- (Test environment may reject, but form validation passes)
- If successful: Order placed, confirmation shown
- If declined: Clear error message shown

Title: Payment - CyberSource - Invalid Card
Steps:
1. Enter invalid card number: 1234567890123456
2. Fill other fields with valid data
3. Attempt to submit
Expected Result:
- Real-time validation on card number field
- Error message: 'Invalid card number' or card icon shows X
- Submit button disabled or error shown on submission

Title: Payment - Authorize.Net - Valid Card
Preconditions: Checkout at payment step, Authorize.Net configured
Steps:

  - LCP (Largest Contentful Paint) < 2.5s

  - CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift) < 0.1

- Images lazy load
- Critical CSS inlined

Title: SQL Injection Prevention
Preconditions: User on search or form page
Steps:
1. Attempt SQL injection in search: laptop' OR '1'='1
2. Attempt in login form: admin' OR '1'='1' --
3. Attempt in registration email field
4. Verify no SQL execution
5. Verify inputs sanitized
Expected Result:
- SQL injection attempts fail gracefully
- No database errors exposed to user
- Generic error messages (no stack traces)
- Input sanitized server-side
- No data leakage
- Application remains stable

Title: XSS (Cross-Site Scripting) Prevention
Preconditions: User on any form or input page
Steps: 1. Attempt XSS in search: 2. Attempt in product review: 3. Attempt in registration name field 4. Verify scripts not executed 5. Verify inputs escaped
Expected Result:
- XSS attempts fail (no script execution)
- Scripts displayed as text or stripped
- Output encoding applied
- No alert dialogs appear
- Console shows no script execution
- Content Security Policy (CSP) headers present

Title: CSRF Protection
Preconditions: User logged in, CSRF tokens implemented
Steps:
1. Inspect form submission (e.g., add to cart)
2. Verify CSRF token present in request
3. Attempt to replay request without token
4. Verify request rejected
5. Attempt with invalid token
Expected Result:
- CSRF tokens present in forms and AJAX requests
- Tokens validated server-side
- Requests without valid token rejected (403 Forbidden)
- Tokens unique per session
- Tokens expire after use or timeout

Title: Password Strength Enforcement
Steps:
1. Attempt weak password: '123456'
2. Attempt password: 'password'
3. Attempt without uppercase
4. Attempt without number
5. Attempt without special char
6. Use strong password: 'MyP@ssw0rd!'
7. Verify requirements enforced
Expected Result:
- Weak passwords rejected
- Password requirements displayed:
  - Minimum 8 characters
  - At least 1 uppercase letter
  - At least 1 lowercase letter
  - At least 1 number
  - At least 1 special character
- Real-time validation feedback
- Strong password accepted
- Password strength indicator displayed (weak/medium/strong)

Title: Secure Payment Data Handling
Steps:
1. Inspect payment form
2. Verify credit card fields in iframe (not direct HTML)
3. Verify no card data in browser storage (localStorage, cookies)
4. Submit payment
5. Inspect network requests
6. Verify card data tokenized (not raw)
7. Verify HTTPS used
Expected Result:
- Payment form uses iframe (CyberSource, Skyflow, etc.)
- Credit card fields isolated (PCI DSS scope reduction)
- No raw card data in HTML
- No card data stored in browser
- Card data tokenized before submission
- Only token sent to server
- All payment communication over HTTPS (SSL/TLS)
- No mixed content warnings
- CSP headers enforce HTTPS

Title: Session Timeout

- Each option shows: Name, available choices, price modifier
- Selecting option updates running total immediately
- Price breakdown displayed:
  - Base price
  - Each option modifier (+/- amounts)
  - Running total
- Required options marked with asterisk or 'Required'
- Add to Cart disabled until all required options selected
- Cart displays configured product with all selections
- Cart shows: Base product + configuration details
- Price in cart matches configured total
- Configuration editable in cart (optional, depends on implementation)

Title: Product Configuration - Custom Text Input
Steps:
1. Navigate to engravable product (jewelry, trophy)
2. Locate text input field: 'Engraving (max 20 characters)'
3. Enter text: 'Congratulations!'
4. Verify character count: 16/20
5. Verify preview updates (if available)
6. Attempt to enter 25 characters
7. Verify blocked or validation error
8. Reduce to valid length
9. Add to cart
10. View cart
11. Verify custom text shown
Expected Result:
- Text input field visible with label
- Character limit specified and enforced
- Real-time character counter shown
- Cannot exceed maximum length
- Visual preview of customization (optional)
- Validation error if invalid characters (e.g., special symbols not allowed)
- Cart displays: Product + Custom Text: 'Congratulations!'
- Engraving fee included in price
- Custom text preserved through checkout
- Order confirmation shows custom text for fulfillment

Title: Product Configuration - Dependent Options
Steps:
1. Navigate to product with dependent options
2. Select Color: Blue
3. Verify Size dropdown updates (only sizes available in Blue)
4. Verify unavailable sizes disabled or hidden
5. Select Size: M
6. Verify Material options appear (only materials for Blue+M)
7. Complete configuration
8. Verify valid combination accepted
9. Add to cart
Expected Result:
- Configuration options have dependencies
- Selecting parent option (Color) filters child options (Size)
- Only valid combinations available
- Unavailable options grayed out or hidden
- Cannot select impossible combinations
- Helpful text: 'Size XL not available in Blue'
- Configuration logic prevents errors
- Valid combination adds to cart successfully
- Complex configurations handled smoothly
